title: Engine visibility integration and SDK search attribute binding
purpose: Wire visibility into the engine: update the visibility index on every state-changing event, and provide the SDK binding for workflow authors to set custom search attributes from workflow code.
task: Add a VisibilityStore to the EngineBuilder. After every state-changing event (WorkflowStarted, WorkflowCompleted, WorkflowFailed, WorkflowCancelled, WorkflowContinuedAsNew, SearchAttributesUpdated), the engine upserts the visibility record. Add a Recorder method record_search_attributes_updated for the SDK to call. The SDK binding (workflow.upsert_search_attributes) records a SearchAttributesUpdated event which triggers the visibility update.

requirements.title: Engine updates visibility on state-changing events
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL update the VisibilityStore on WorkflowStarted, WorkflowCompleted, WorkflowFailed, WorkflowCancelled, WorkflowContinuedAsNew, and SearchAttributesUpdated events. Each update upserts the full WorkflowSummary with current status, times, and search attributes.
acceptance: After WorkflowStarted, the workflow appears in list_workflows with status Running.
After WorkflowCompleted, the workflow's status is Completed and close_time is set.
After WorkflowFailed, the workflow's status is Failed.
After SearchAttributesUpdated, the workflow's search attributes are updated in the visibility index.

requirements.title: Recorder records SearchAttributesUpdated
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL add record_search_attributes_updated to the Recorder that appends a SearchAttributesUpdated event with the provided attribute map. The Recorder SHALL validate attribute types against the registered schema.
acceptance: After recording, the event appears in read_history.
Setting an attribute with a type that doesn't match the schema returns an error.

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement Gleam SDK bindings for upsert_search_attributes — those require the aion_flow crate and belong in a separate brief.
SHALL NOT implement server query endpoints — that is AV-005.
SHALL NOT implement NIF-level search attribute dispatch — the Recorder method is called from the host side.
verification: Tests cover: visibility update on each state-changing event, search attribute recording, type validation.
